title: Mistral预告今夏推出新"fat"开源模型系列
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
🚨 AI News | TestingCatalog
@testingcatalog
MISTRAL 🔥: A new “fat” model family has been teased to arrive this summer!
The model will be open-weight and initially released in early access for key partners.
> This will be the start of a new family of models, fat indeed, but sparse. We're opening up an early access pro rtners in research, government and the industry.
> This model and upcoming ones will be open-weight. We believe this is critical for our customer confidence and for the research and developer communities.
Le Chaton Fat soon? 👀
Arthur Mensch
@arthurmensch
9h
We somehow got put in the spotlight the last few days! First we'd like to thank the organizers of the AI show for that, we can't get enough of this stuff. I'll say a few things about where we are and what we do.
4:44 PM · Jun 16, 2026 27.7K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: Mistral预告今夏推出新"fat"开源模型系列
discovery_record.discovery_summary: Mistral 预告将在今年夏季推出一个新的"fat"模型系列，模型为 open-weight，7 月面向研究、政府和行业关键合作伙伴开放早期访问。官方称该系列"fat indeed， but sparse"（大但稀疏），并强调开放权重对客户信任和开发者社区至关重要。后续模型也将保持开源。此外，推文还提及了"Le Chaton Fat"的代号。

key_excerpts.text: Mistral 预告将在今年夏季推出一个新的"fat"模型系列，模型为 open-weight，7 月面向研究、政府和行业关键合作伙伴开放早期访问。官方称该系列"fat indeed， but sparse"（大但稀疏），并强调开放权重对客户信任和开发者社区至关重要。后续模型也将保持开源。此外，推文还提及了"Le Chaton Fat"的代号。

The model will be open-weight and initially released in early access for key partners.

We're opening up an early access pro rtners in research, government and the industry.
> This model and upcoming ones will be open-weight.
